As a UX designer, it's always a challenge to cope seeing an app with so many users suffer the consequences of bad design but staying loyal to the brand. The playlist management is not ideal, often really hard to navigate. The ultra dark theme doesn't enthuse me with excitement. The intermittent problems with bluetooth makes the service completely obsolete as they greedily grab for any data they can harvest and monetise. It needs fixing and quickly. Greed is wrecking Spotify.

Spotify is an amazing music streaming platform with a great user experience, excellent recommendations, and a huge music library. However, it's disappointing that my country, Bangladesh, still doesn't have an official Spotify Chart, even though Spotify has been officially available here for years. Adding an official Bangladesh Spotify Chart would help fans support their favorite artists and give local musicians the recognition they deserve. I hope Spotify introduces an official BD chart 📉
